div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Caffery) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, October 6, 1942—6 p.m.
[Received October 7—1:50 a.m.]

div.p: 4026. For Chalmers from Satterthwaite. Anderson, Standard Oil, has received telegram through Naval AttachéRear Adm. Augustin T. Beauregard. from MichlerG. H. Michler, official of the Standard Oil Company of New York. requesting that I telegraph you my opinion of propriety of delivering fuel and oil to VarigS. A. Empresa de Viacao Aerea Rio Grandense. for run Porto Alegre–Montevideo, and to CorporaciónCorporación Sudamericana de Servicios Aéreos, S. A. for proposed Buenos Aires–Rio de Janeiro service.

I recommend that Varig receive reasonable and necessary amounts fuel for Porto Alegre–Montevideo service, but that Corporación not be given any fuel for any extension of its services. Every effort should be made to prevent Corporación from obtaining fuel elsewhere for contemplated run.
